metadata.name: acc-provision
metadata.summary: Tool to provision ACI for ACI Containers Controller  Build info: Git commit ID: 60753b18b4cf578e85f0baf0831dbfbf9067c1e8 Build time: 12-20-2024.09:55:40.UTC

modules.name: acc_provision.aci_set_service_bd_routing_disable_yes
documentation: Script to set serviceBdRoutingDisable attribute of service BD as yes
eg: python3 aci_set_service_bd_routing_disable_yes.py -c <acc-provision input yaml file>

functions.name: acc_provision.test_main.test_with_default_profile
documentation: Commenting code to disable the install_istio flag as the functionality
is disabled to remove dependency from istio.io/istio package.
Vulnerabilties were detected by quay.io security scan of aci-containers-controller
and aci-containers-operator images for istio.io/istio package

functions.name: acc_provision.acc_provision.construct_yaml_str
documentation: This black magic forces pyyaml to load YAML strings as unicode rather
than byte strings in Python 2, thus ensuring that the type of strings

methods.name: acc_provision.apic_provision.ApicKubeConfig.bgp_route_control
documentation: Set BGP Route Control Enforcement to Import/Export

methods.name: acc_provision.apic_provision.ApicKubeConfig.ext_epg_int
documentation: Add subnets to svi ext EPG

methods.name: acc_provision.apic_provision.ApicKubeConfig.bgp_addr_family_context
documentation: Create BGP Address Family Context Policy

methods.name: acc_provision.apic_provision.ApicKubeConfig.bgp_addr_family_context_to_vrf
documentation: Map BGP Address Family Context Policy to Calico VRF for V4

methods.name: acc_provision.apic_provision.ApicKubeConfig.bgp_addr_family_context_to_vrf_v6
documentation: Map BGP Address Family Context Policy to Calico VRF for V6
